name: Jibril
description: A strange student with weak sense of boundary.

0: Hm, it's afternoon already... I suppose I could use a little nap.
What? I can still fall asleep even if you stare.
1: If you need anything, just ask. Nothing couldn't be solved with a little money.
2: Heh, You've got quite taste for friends.
Not that I mind about it.
3: ...Do you have something to say to me? No? Very well. Leave me alone then.

name: Aldric
description: A gruff but kind blacksmith who forges enchanted equipment. He respects hard work and perseverance above all.

0: Hmph. Another one looking for handouts? Prove your mettle first.
The forge waits for no one. Get to work.
1: You've got grit, I'll give you that.
Keep showing up and maybe I'll teach you a thing or two.
2: Ha! You remind me of myself when I was young.
Here, take this — you've earned it through sweat and steel.
3: You're the finest apprentice I've ever had.
The flames of the forge burn eternal, just like our bond.

tiers.title: Stranger
tiers.description: Just another face passing the forge.

tiers.title: Ally
tiers.description: A trusted friend of the forge.

name: Luna
description: A whimsical herbalist who tends to a magical garden. She loves rare coins and shiny trinkets.

0: Oh! A visitor! The flowers were just telling me someone was coming.
Don't step on the moonblossoms, please!
1: You came back! The garden missed you. Well, I missed you too.
Would you like to help me water the starlight ferns?
2: I made you a special herbal tea! It helps with focus, you know.
You're my favorite person to share the garden with.
3: The garden blooms brighter when you're here.
I've been saving the rarest seed just for you. Let's plant it together!

tiers.title: Passerby
tiers.description: A curious soul wandering near the garden.

tiers.title: Blossom Friend
tiers.description: A dear companion of the garden.
